reviews.review_description: I really like the game it is mostly true to life the only thing I would like to see is when we hold the brake and gas or if we put it in neutral and give it gas the engine would idle up and the forks would go up faster but you can’t ask for everything lol it is a great game and a great way to practice for real life driving in my opinion
does not work properly you can't even reverse doesn't really even pick up anything a waste
